about: Suggest an improvement or new capability

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What are you trying to do that you can't do today?
     Does this relate to an existing frustration or limitation? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to happen, with a usage example if possible.
     e.g. a new flag, different default behaviour, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you tried working around it with --binary, --style, -p, or --fallback-style?
     Any other approaches you considered? -->
